WhatsApp accounting

Prepare accounts entries from WhatsApp-style daily business inputs.

Send a voice note, bill photo, receipt or bank transaction text. Fastbooks prepares a draft accounting entry for review.

Phone-first accounts capture

For teams that do business on phone but accounts on desktop.

Voice notes

Capture amount, party, payment mode and narration while context is fresh.

Bill photos

Preserve invoice and purchase details before paper bills disappear.

Review inbox

FFastbooks

Accounting software for Indian businesses that prepares sales, purchase, expense and bank entries from everyday inputs for accountant review.

  • GST billing software
  • Bank reconciliation software
